ocr_reason: High-density scale slide with ranked causes, counts, and explanatory boxes; OCR is the right capture path.

blocks.text: From a flood of failures to a short list of causes.
You can't read a million failing traces. Diagnosis clusters them by similarity and categorizes each group — so you fix the biggest cause first, not the loudest symptom.
